---
title: "Projects"
---

A selection of my more prominent projects and work.

::: {.projects}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Quarto Journal

*Placeholder for your Quarto journal project*

A reproducible research journal written in Quarto, combining narrative, code, and visualizations.

- **Tools:** Quarto, R/Python
- **Link:** [Add your journal link here](#)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Project Placeholder 2

*Add your second project here*

Brief description of the project, its goals, and outcomes.

- **Tools:** Add technologies used
- **Link:** [Add link or repo](#)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Project Placeholder 3

*Add your third project here*

Brief description of the project.

- **Tools:** Add technologies used
- **Link:** [Add link or repo](#)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
## Project Placeholder 4

*Add your fourth project here*

Brief description of the project.

- **Tools:** Add technologies used
- **Link:** [Add link or repo](#)

:::

:::
:::
